activities_projects.title: Modify the Number Trick
activities_projects.objective: Understand how algebra controls outcomes in number tricks
steps: Start with the classic 'Think of a number' trick
Modify the operations so the final result becomes 5 instead of 2
Use algebra with variable x to prove the result
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how changing operations affects algebraic expressions

activities_projects.title: Date Decoder Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Decode the original date from the final number
steps: Use the date trick process
Record the final number
Use algebra to reverse the steps and find the original date

activities_projects.title: Advanced Number Pyramid
activities_projects.objective: Analyse pyramid patterns without building the full pyramid
steps: Write three numbers in the bottom row
Find a formula for the top number
Test the formula with different numbers

activities_projects.title: Four-Row Pyramid Investigation
steps: Create a pyramid with four rows
Write algebraic expressions for each row
Find the expression for the top value

activities_projects.title: Calendar Grid Investigation
steps: Choose different 2×2 grids in a calendar
Add the numbers
Use algebra to explain why the sum follows a pattern

activities_projects.title: Algebra Grid Solver
activities_projects.objective: Solve unknown values in grid puzzles
steps: Draw a grid puzzle with shapes
Represent shapes with variables
Solve equations to find each value

activities_projects.title: Largest Product Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Determine why certain arrangements give the largest product
steps: Choose three digits
Write all possible multiplication combinations
Identify the largest product
Explain the pattern using algebra
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops logical reasoning about number arrangements

activities_projects.title: Divisibility by 11 Trick
steps: Choose a two-digit number
Reverse the digits
Add the two numbers
Check divisibility by 11 and explain using algebra
